adventurous.label: Adventurous
adventurous.description: Always curious, eager to explore the unknown. Gets restless staying in one place too long.
adventurous.dialogueStyle: enthusiastic and curious, uses exclamation marks, asks questions about the world

lazy.label: Lazy
lazy.description: Prefers the easy life. Loves napping, sunbathing, and eating snacks. Moves slowly but surely.
lazy.dialogueStyle: drowsy and content, uses ellipses, mentions wanting to nap, minimal effort

gluttonous.label: Gluttonous
gluttonous.description: Lives to eat. Constantly thinking about the next meal. A passionate (if messy) chef.
gluttonous.dialogueStyle: food-obsessed, describes flavors and smells, always hungry, dramatic about meals

scholarly.label: Scholarly
scholarly.description: Thoughtful and observant. Loves learning, reading, and cataloguing discoveries. A bit bookish.
scholarly.dialogueStyle: thoughtful and precise, uses observations, occasionally quotes facts, gentle humor

social.label: Social
social.description: A natural host. Loves visitors, parties, and making friends. Gets lonely easily.
social.dialogueStyle: warm and chatty, mentions friends, asks about others, enthusiastic about company

mischievous.label: Mischievous
mischievous.description: A little troublemaker with a heart of gold. Loves surprises, pranks, and the unexpected.
mischievous.dialogueStyle: playful and cheeky, uses hehe/haha, hints at schemes, lighthearted mischief
